error[E0277]: `main` has invalid return type `i32`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/conversions/pointers_c3/sample_001/target.rs:5:14
  |
5 | fn main() -> i32 {
  |              ^^^ `main` can only return types that implement `Termination`
  |
  = help: consider using `()`, or a `Result`

  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/conversions/pointers_c3/sample_001/target.rs:17:39

   |              ----------------------   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ expected `Option<fn(i32) -> i32>`, found `*const fn(i32) -> i32`
   |              |
   |              expected due to this
   |
   = note:     expected enum `Option<fn(i32) -> i32>`
           found raw pointer `*const fn(i32) -> i32`
